{{Youmay|the ship that was used during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]|the [[Perspicacity (New Sith Wars)|''Perspicacity'']] that was used during the [[New Sith Wars]]}}
'''''Perspicacity''''' was a [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior clans. In [[3963 BBY]], as the Mandalorians threatened the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Serroco]], ''Perspicacity'' was part of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Saul Karath]]'s<ref name="serroco" /> [[Battle Group Serroco]]<ref name="karath" /> intended to protect the world. In the ensuing [[Battle of Serroco|attack]], the Mandalorians devastated Serroco with [[Nuclear weapon/Legends|nuclear missiles]],<ref name="kotor15">[[Knights of the Old Republic 15|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 15]]</ref> and ''Perspicacity'' was lost over the world.<ref name="cswe" /> The [[Starship/Legends|vessel's]] destruction was later listed in an [[The Admiral's List: Remember Serroco! Edition|edition]] of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'', an official publication issued by the Republic Navy.<ref name="serroco" />

==Behind the scenes==
''Perspicacity'' was first mentioned in ''[[The Admiral's List: Remember Serroco! Edition]]'', an in-universe news report<ref name="serroco" /> appearing on the back page of [[Knights of the Old Republic 17|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 17]], written by [[John Jackson Miller]] and released in [[2007]].<ref name="kotor17">[[Knights of the Old Republic 17|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 17]]</ref> The ship was later given an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="cswe" />
